fixture: Vulcan Mesa demo via Demo Data menu

aiPanel.promptCopy: Ask about the current project, a tract, a lessor, or a mineral-math scenario. All active calculations assume Texas oil-and-gas rules.

approvalBoundaryValidation.reason: Phase 0 smoke should not depend on a live LLM or external provider. Approval boundaries were validated by targeted AI unit tests instead.
approvalBoundaryValidation.command: npm test -- src/ai/__tests__/approval-preview.test.ts src/ai/__tests__/approval-store.test.ts src/ai/__tests__/action-journal.test.ts src/ai/__tests__/chat-context.test.ts src/ai/__tests__/system-prompt.test.ts

result.note: The approval-store path in the command did not correspond to a runnable test file in this checkout; Vitest ran the existing matching files.

notes: This smoke records visible AI panel and provider settings behavior.
It does not call a cloud model, local Ollama, or create a mutating proposal.
Mutating proposal approval, blocked-preview behavior, action-journal context, and system-prompt integrity are covered by targeted unit tests.
